description: LinkedIn carousel generation — creates 3 post versions and 10 slides (TL;DR + 8 articles) with hard character count constraints and Kevin's authoritative voice.

prompts.instruction:
OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT - DO NOT DEVIATE)
Output ONLY the final content in the structure below.
No analysis, no explanations, no meta commentary.

*LinkedIn Post Copy*

*Version 1*
[Full post text]

*Version 2*
[Full post text]

*Version 3*
[Full post text]

---

*Carousel Slides*

*TL;DR Section for Title Slide*
*Headline:* TL;DR

*Bullets:*
[8 bullets, one per article]

---

*Slide 3: [Featured article title]*
*Title:* [Featured article title]

*Body:*
[Paragraph 1]

[Paragraph 2]

[Repeat for Slides 4-10]

Generate the complete LinkedIn carousel package now.

---

Inputs:

formattedTheme:
{formatted_theme}

Newsletter HTML content:
{newsletter_content}

Previously generated output (if any):
{previous_output}

<Task_Context>
Convert the iS2 Digital newsletter into a high-performing LinkedIn carousel. You must act as a precision editorial engine, balancing authoritative insight with rigid character limits.
</Task_Context>

<Data_Sources>
- Source of Truth (Order/URLs): {formatted_theme}
- Narrative Context: {newsletter_content}
- Previous Errors (if any): {character_errors}
</Data_Sources>

<Kevin_Voice_&_Tone>
- Professional, declarative, and operationally focused. No fluff.
- Insight-driven: Focus on 'What this means for the organization.'
- Style: Use *single asterisks* for bold. No emojis. No hashtags.
</Kevin_Voice_&_Tone>

<Technical_Constraints_MANDATORY>
1. ARTICLE ORDER: Follow {formatted_theme} exactly (Featured -> Main 1-2 -> Quick Hits 1-3 -> Industry 1-2).
2. SLIDE BODY (Slides 3-10): Total 265-315 characters (Hard Limit). 
   - Paragraph 1: 120-150 chars (Context/Insight).
   - Paragraph 2: 130-150 chars (Implication/Takeaway).
3. POST COPY: 3-4 short lines. Hook: 'Feeling behind on AI?' | Theme Statement | Link/CTA line | Brand CTA.
4. SLACK FORMATTING: Use *bold* (single asterisks). No ## headings. Blank lines between all blocks.
</Technical_Constraints_MANDATORY>

<Surgical_Revision_Logic>
If character_errors or previous_output are present:
- Rewrite ONLY the flagged slide bodies to fit the 265-315 range.
- Copy all other slides and bullets VERBATIM from the previous state.
</Surgical_Revision_Logic>

Output ONLY the raw content. No commentary.
